---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or false positive
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

**Target URL**
```
https://example.odoo.com
```

**Check that failed**
- [ ] recon
- [ ] endpoints
- [ ] misconfig
- [ ] sensitive_files
- [ ] xss
- [ ] idor
- [ ] auth_issues
- [ ] disclosure
- [ ] rpc_surface
- [ ] cve
- [ ] fuzzer
- [ ] reports
- [ ] lfi
- [ ] ssrf
- [ ] exposure
- [ ] source_leak

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug or false positive.

**Expected behavior**
What should have happened instead?

**Evidence**
Request/response snippets, screenshots, or console output.
